nasb.text: Now the Philistines fought against Israel; and the men of Israel fled before the Philistines and fell slain on Mount Gilboa.

esv.text: Now the Philistines fought against Israel, and the men of Israel fled before the Philistines and fell slain on Mount Gilboa.

cnv.text: 非利士人攻打以色列人；以色列人從非利士人面前逃跑，在基利波山上陣亡的人很多。

ccb.text: 非利士人与以色列人交战，以色列人败逃，许多人在基利波山被杀。
